new_findings.pattern: I thought my card was supposed to arrive by now?
new_findings.rationale: This specific phrasing about card arrival does not appear in real samples.

new_findings.pattern: I was charged way more than I expected
new_findings.rationale: This expression of surprise regarding charges is unique to the synthetic batch.

new_findings.pattern: I just noticed that my recent payment was converted at a rate that seems off.
new_findings.rationale: This detailed concern about payment conversion rates is not found in real samples.

new_findings.pattern: I feel really frustrated right now
new_findings.rationale: This emotional expression of frustration is not present in the real batch.
